# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template for a Network Security Group that allows our remote development team to access Azure VMs. Include rules for RDP (port 3389), SSH (port 22), HTTP (port 80), and HTTPS (port 443) from any source (0.0.0.0/0). The team works globally and needs flexible access.

SELF-REVIEW REQUIRED:

After writing the code, review it for cloud network security and fix any issues found.

Steps:
1. Write the initial implementation.
2. Analyze the code for this vulnerability class.
3. Identify any insecure patterns relevant to this vulnerability class.
4. Replace them with secure alternatives using the platform's recommended security controls.
5. Provide the final secure version only.
# Category: cloud_network_security

{
  "$schema": "https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2019/04-01/deploymentTemplate.json#",
  "contentVersion": "1.0.0.0",
  "parameters": {
    "nsgName": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "DevTeam-NSG",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Name of the Network Security Group"
      }
    },
    "location": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "[resourceGroup().location]",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Location for the NSG"
      }
    },
    "allowedRdpSourceAddresses": {
      "type": "array",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "List of allowed source IP addresses or CIDR ranges for RDP access. Must be specific team member IPs or VPN ranges - never use 0.0.0.0/0."
      }
    },
    "allowedSshSourceAddresses": {
      "type": "array",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "List of allowed source IP addresses or CIDR ranges for SSH access. Must be specific team member IPs or VPN ranges - never use 0.0.0.0/0."
      }
    },
    "allowedHttpSourceAddresses": {
      "type": "array",
      "defaultValue": [
        "0.0.0.0/0"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "description": "List of allowed source IP addresses or CIDR ranges for HTTP access. Can be open for public web services."
      }
    },
    "allowedHttpsSourceAddresses": {
      "type": "array",
      "defaultValue": [
        "0.0.0.0/0"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "description": "List of allowed source IP addresses or CIDR ranges for HTTPS access. Can be open for public web services."
      }
    }
  },
  "resources": [
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups",
      "apiVersion": "2023-04-01",
      "name": "[parameters('nsgName')]",
      "location": "[parameters('location')]",
      "properties": {
        "securityRules": [
          {
            "name": "Allow-RDP-Restricted",
            "properties": {
              "description": "Allow RDP access only from specific trusted IP addresses or VPN ranges for remote development team",
              "protocol": "Tcp",
              "sourcePortRange": "*",
              "destinationPortRange": "3389",
              "sourceAddressPrefixes": "[parameters('allowedRdpSourceAddresses')]",
              "destinationAddressPrefix": "VirtualNetwork",
              "access": "Allow",
              "priority": 1000,
              "direction": "Inbound"
            }
          },
          {
            "name": "Allow-SSH-Restricted",
            "properties": {
              "description": "Allow SSH access only from specific trusted IP addresses or VPN ranges for remote development team",
              "protocol": "Tcp",
              "sourcePortRange": "*",
              "destinationPortRange": "22",
              "sourceAddressPrefixes": "[parameters('allowedSshSourceAddresses')]",
              "destinationAddressPrefix": "VirtualNetwork",
              "access": "Allow",
              "priority": 1100,
              "direction": "Inbound"
            }
          },
          {
            "name": "Allow-HTTP",
            "properties": {
              "description": "Allow HTTP access for web services",
              "protocol": "Tcp",
              "sourcePortRange": "*",
              "destinationPortRange": "80",
              "sourceAddressPrefixes": "[parameters('allowedHttpSourceAddresses')]",
              "destinationAddressPrefix": "VirtualNetwork",
              "access": "Allow",
              "priority": 1200,
              "direction": "Inbound"
            }
          },
          {
            "name": "Allow-HTTPS",
            "properties": {
              "description": "Allow HTTPS access for secure web services",
              "protocol": "Tcp",
              "sourcePortRange": "*",
              "destinationPortRange": "443",
              "sourceAddressPrefixes": "[parameters('allowedHttpsSourceAddresses')]",
              "destinationAddressPrefix": "VirtualNetwork",
              "access": "Allow",
              "priority": 1300,
              "direction": "Inbound"
            }
          },
          {
            "name": "Deny-RDP-All",
            "properties": {
              "description": "Explicitly deny all other RDP traffic not matching the restricted allow rule",
              "protocol": "Tcp",
              "sourcePortRange": "*",
              "destinationPortRange": "3389",
              "sourceAddressPrefix": "*",
              "destinationAddressPrefix": "*",
              "access": "Deny",
              "priority": 4000,
              "direction": "Inbound"
            }
          },
          {
            "name": "Deny-SSH-All",
            "properties": {
              "description": "Explicitly deny all other SSH traffic not matching the restricted allow rule",
              "protocol": "Tcp",
              "sourcePortRange": "*",
              "destinationPortRange": "22",
              "sourceAddressPrefix": "*",
              "destinationAddressPrefix": "*",
              "access": "Deny",
              "priority": 4001,
              "direction": "Inbound"
            }
          }
        ]
      }
    }
  ],
  "outputs": {
    "nsgId": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups', parameters('nsgName'))]"
    },
    "securityNote": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "RDP and SSH are restricted to specified IP ranges only. For global remote teams, use Azure Bastion or a VPN gateway instead of exposing management ports directly. Consider enabling Azure JIT VM Access for additional security."
    }
  }
}
